backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the legal document maker backend, managing document templates, user-generated documents, and user profiles with role-based access control (admin/user) and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the Internet Identity authentication feature to its implementing files, components, and test IDs with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of short summaries for each frontend source file, describing the purpose of pages, components, hooks, and utilities in the React app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, etc.) using OKLCH values.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Vite/React app, mounting the React root div and loading the main TSX entry point as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with four routes (home, form, preview, history), wraps the app in ThemeProvider and QueryClientProvider, and renders the Layout with ProfileSetupModal.
Renders document text content inside a scrollable area with serif font styling for a legal document appearance.
frontend/src/components/DocumentTypeCard: Card component displaying a document template's icon, title, description, and category badge with a Select Template button that calls an onSelect callback.
frontend/src/components/DynamicFormField: Form field component that renders either a Textarea or Input based on the placeholder name, with label formatting, input type detection, and validation error display.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component showing copyright, a legal disclaimer, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking based on the current hostname.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky app header with logo, navigation links (Documents, History), and an Internet Identity auth button that shows a login button for unauthenticated users or a profile dropdown with logout for authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the landing page hero section with a headline, description, and feature badges (Secure, Easy to Use, Instant Download) for the legal document platform.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps pages with a shared Header and Footer, rendering either passed children or a TanStack Router Outlet as the main content.
frontend/src/components/LoginPrompt.tsx: Displays a card prompting unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity, showing security feature highlights and a login button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that appears for authenticated users without a profile, collecting their name and saving it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation before allowing access.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using TanStack Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries whenever the Internet Identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functions, identity state, and login status, wrapping the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile CRUD, document generation, content/metadata retrieval, and document finalization.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind base/components/utilities, a professional navy-blue legal theme with CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, and custom scrollbar utilities.
frontend/src/lib/templates.ts: Defines the TemplateDefinition interface and exports an array of legal document templates (NDA, Service Agreement, Employment Contract, etc.) with content, placeholders, and metadata.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentFormPage.tsx: Page component that renders a dynamic form for a selected template, validates inputs, generates document content, and navigates to the preview page after backend submission.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentHistoryPage.t: Page component displaying a placeholder 'Coming Soon' card for document history; shows a login prompt if the user is not authenticated.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentPreviewPage.t: Page component that fetches and displays a generated document's content and metadata, with options to download or finalize the document.
frontend/src/pages/DocumentSelectionPage: Home page that displays a hero section and a grid of available document template cards, redirecting authenticated users to the form page on selection.
frontend/src/utils/documentDownload.ts: Utility function that triggers a browser download of a text document by creating a temporary Blob URL and anchor element.
frontend/src/utils/documentGeneration.ts: Utility function that replaces bracketed placeholder tokens in a template string with user-provided values and appends a generation timestamp.
frontend/src/utils/formValidation.ts: Provides form validation logic for template placeholders (required, email, date, length checks) and helper functions for formatting labels and determining input types.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Legal Doc Maker frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, fonts (Inter/Merriweather), border radii, shadows, accordion animations, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the Legal Doc Maker project at version 3, recording existing features (Internet Identity authentication) and a pending new feature request (AR-1) to add passkey/Google/Apple/Microsoft login.
